message:
Sanitize FTS5 snippet HTML in search results to prevent XSS

Add sanitizeSnippet() that escapes HTML entities in FTS5 snippets while
preserving <mark> highlight tags using Unicode private-use-area
placeholders. Apply to both createResultCard and createResultCardHtml
renderers instead of inserting raw snippet HTML.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
